name: Inside The Crystal Mountain
short_description: Inside The Crystal Mountain is a difficult action-adventure game with fast-paced combat and soulslike elements where you explore a mysterious world filled with ambiguous characters and challenging enemies.
detailed_description:
INSIDE THE CRYSTAL MOUNTAIN

He promised to help you return to your kind, but only if you can defeat the three... beasts. You thought it would be a walk in the park, but instead, you found yourself facing terrifying robots trying to destroy you, strange characters speaking to you from the water, giant lasers, and a small world to explore full of items and upgrades. Every time you try again, reborn from where you started, but this time with something more. This is what awaits you inside the Crystal Mountain.

Features

  • High level of challenge.
  • Fast and precise hack 'n' slash combat system where you must constantly move and attack.
  • Huge bosses to defeat.
  • A small game world to explore, full of items and upgrades to discover.
  • Free exploration: interact with various characters and figure out what they want from you, as there are no arrows or hints in this game.
  • Plenty of pixel art visual effects.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
